description: CompositionMaroon round neck top made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves with drawstring at the midriffFitRegularWash careHand washDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, or bleachDry flat in shadeCool ironThis season's fuss-free minimalistic trend is nailed in this top with its plush fabric. The drawstring detail adds an interesting dimension to this basic top. Style this piece from s.oliver with form fitting denims, closed-toe casual shoes from enroute and a  vibrant scarf.Model statisticsThe product is a size 40 on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
